scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/company-admin" "npm run dev -w apps/store-admin" "npm run dev -w apps/storefront" "npm run dev:edge"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/company-admin && npm run build -w apps/store-admin && npm run build -w apps/storefront
